examples: She is raring to get back to work after her operation.
After a good night's sleep, Paul said he was raring to go.
He is raring to charge into the fray and lay down the law.
"I'll be back for the third game against France, fighting fit, raring to go, " Moody stated.
Now back at Albion, the Czech striker is raring to get an opportunity to show the Baggies' fans he means business.
